narrative:
41 Ohio House district has 75,601 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.6% D−R vs +17.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
